title: Transformer Retrieval for Tokenization Study 1
abstract: We present a cs.CL benchmark focused on tokenization and question answering. The study evaluates reproducible baselines, ablations, and error analysis on ACL style tasks. Results emphasize category-specific signals such as tokenization, question answering, and deployment constraints typical for cs.CL workflows.
